summary:
No evidence links GRG5 to mouse embryonic development—specifically, neither early nor late phases—including functional roles or gene expression data. Therefore, stating GRG5 acts solely in late embryonic development has no scientific foundation based on current literature.

The summary focuses strictly on clinically/physiologically significant findings regarding GRG5’s potential role in embryo development without introducing speculative interpretations beyond what exists in available research sources.
